title: Delightful Cookie
description: The best 3D cookie resource pack on the market!
body:
# 🍪 Delightful Cookie

This pack literally just changes the cookie to be 3D. Delicious! 🍪😋

Here's some images:

![Eating](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd3ae2c1a1960db1fa362fa48a60db9d1fd5ed5d_0.webp)
![Held](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/790a9d2038e9d63c0dc82360cf39a4bb60e44955.png)
